children.heading: Council
children.label: 1 Council
children.text: The term “Council” means the Estuary Habitat Restoration Council established by .section 2904 of this title

children.heading: Estuary
children.label: 2 Estuary
children.text: The term “estuary” means a part of a river or stream or other body of water that has an unimpaired connection with the open sea and where the sea water is measurably diluted with fresh water derived from land drainage. The term also includes near coastal waters and wetlands of the Great Lakes that are similar in form and function to estuaries, including the area located in the Great Lakes biogeographic region and designated as a National Estuarine Research Reserve under the Coastal Zone Management Act of 1972 ( et seq.) as of .16 U.S.C. 1451November 7, 2000

children.heading: Estuary habitat
children.label: 3 Estuary habitat
children.text: The term “estuary habitat” means the physical, biological, and chemical elements associated with an estuary, including the complex of physical and hydrologic features and living organisms within the estuary and associated ecosystems.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “estuary habitat restoration activity” means an activity that results in improving degraded estuaries or estuary habitat or creating estuary habitat (including both physical and functional restoration), with the goal of attaining a self-sustaining system integrated into the surrounding landscape.

children.label: i
children.text: the reestablishment of chemical, physical, hydrologic, and biological features and components associated with an estuary;

children.label: ii
children.text: except as provided in subparagraph (C), the cleanup of pollution for the benefit of estuary habitat;

children.label: iii
children.text: the control of nonnative and invasive species in the estuary;

children.label: iv
children.text: the reintroduction of species native to the estuary, including through such means as planting or promoting natural succession;

children.label: v
children.text: the construction of reefs to promote fish and shellfish production and to provide estuary habitat for living resources; and

children.label: vi
children.text: other activities that improve estuary habitat.

children.label: i
children.text: constitutes mitigation required under any Federal or State law for the adverse effects of an activity regulated or otherwise governed by Federal or State law; or

children.label: ii
children.text: constitutes restoration for natural resource damages required under any Federal or State law.

children.heading: Estuary habitat restoration project
children.label: 5 Estuary habitat restoration project
children.text: The term “estuary habitat restoration project” means a project to carry out an estuary habitat restoration activity.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “estuary habitat restoration plan” means any Federal, State, or regional plan for restoration of degraded estuary habitat that was developed with the substantial participation of appropriate public and private stakeholders.

children.label: i
children.text: a comprehensive conservation and management plan approved under ;section 1330 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: a lakewide management plan or remedial action plan developed under ;section 1268 of this title

children.label: iii
children.text: a management plan approved under the Coastal Zone Management Act of 1972 ( et seq.); and16 U.S.C. 1451

children.label: iv
children.text: the interstate management plan developed pursuant to the Chesapeake Bay program under .section 1267 of this title

children.heading: Indian tribe
children.label: 7 Indian tribe
children.text: The term “Indian tribe” has the meaning given such term by .section 5304 of title 25

children.heading: Non-Federal interest
children.label: 8 Non-Federal interest
children.text: The term “non-Federal interest” means a State, a political subdivision of a State, an Indian tribe, a regional or interstate agency, or, as provided in , a nongovernmental organization.section 2903(f)(2) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 9 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Army.

children.heading: State
children.label: 10 State
children.text: The term “State” means the States of Alabama, Alaska, California, Connecticut, Delaware, Florida, Georgia, Hawaii, Illinois, Indiana, Louisiana, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Michigan, Minnesota, Mississippi, New Hampshire, New Jersey, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Oregon, Pennsylvania, Rhode Island, South Carolina, Texas, Virginia, Washington, and Wisconsin, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, the United States Virgin Islands, American Samoa, and Guam.
